# ISEXY

> ISEXY is a dating app connecting Canadians with Cuban singles. It offers verified profiles, a voice-first phone line, and meaningful cross-border matches.

ISEXY operates from Montreal, Canada and complies with WCAG 2.2 AA. Support: cubaresort.ca@gmail.com.

## Pages

- [Home](/): App overview and signup entry points.
- [About](/about): Company background and mission.
- [News](/news): Product updates and announcements.
- [Love Stories](/love-stories): Real couples who met on ISEXY.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about accounts, matching, subscriptions, and safety.
- [Help & Support](/help-support): Get help and contact options.
- [Contact Us](/contact-us): Reach the support team.
- [Knowledge Base](/knowledge-base): Self-serve articles.
- [Safety](/safety): Safety overview.
- [Safety Tips](/safety-tips): Practical tips for safe dating.
- [Community Guidelines](/community-guidelines): Rules of conduct.
- [House Rules](/house-rules): Behaviour expectations.
- [Dating Regulations](/dating-regulations): Legal context for cross-border dating.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Cookie Policy](/cookie-policy): How cookies are used.
- [Consumer Health Privacy](/consumer-health-privacy): Health data privacy.
- [Licenses](/licenses): Open source attributions.
- [Compare Plans](/compare-plans): Plus, Gold, and Platinum subscription comparison.
- [Tourist Signup](/tourist-signup): Signup flow for Canadian / tourist users.
- [Cuban Signup](/cuban-signup): Signup flow for Cuban users.
- [Referrals](/referrals): Referral program.

## Optional

- [Team CubaDate](/team-cubadate): Team page.
- [QA Events](/qa-events): Live Q&A events.
